ddls:
CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survey */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the survey */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the survey */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience of the survey */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size of the survey */,
  "response_rate" REAL /* Response rate of the survey */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the survey (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the question belongs to */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of question (e.g., yes/no, multi-select, open-ended) */,
  "is_mandatory" INTEGER /* Whether the question is mandatory */,
  "is_multi_select" INTEGER /* Whether the question is multi-select */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each option */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the option belongs to */,
  "option_text" TEXT /* Text of the option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the response belongs to */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent */,
  "response_value" TEXT /* Value of the response (e.g., 1, 2, -8) */,
  "response_label" TEXT /* Label of the response (e.g., Yes, No, Inapplicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the frequency belongs to */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response the frequency belongs to */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the response */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the response */,
  "valid_percentage" REAL /* Valid percentage of the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_frequencies_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_frequencies_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "respondents" (
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each respondent */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the respondent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the respondent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the respondent */,
  "demographics" TEXT /* Demographic information of the respondent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses_by_respondent" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question */,
  "response_value" TEXT /* Value of the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id", "respondent_id", "question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey version */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the survey version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survey version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_versions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question version */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the question version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the question version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the question version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_versions_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the survey */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write) */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey deployment */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey being deployed */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was deployed */,
  "deployment_type" TEXT /* Type of deployment (e.g., pilot, production) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_deployments_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)
